title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SOMINOT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIARGAO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO SAN ANTONIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4092 / 57 OG No. 12, 2109 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2880, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SOMINOT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIARGAO, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO SAN ANTONIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Sominot in the Municipality of Liargao, Province of Zamboanga del Sur, is changed to San Antonio.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
